list.emptyDescription: Formats will be automatically identified after uploading files, or you can create a format manually.
list.errorDescription: Unable to load format list, please try again later.
list.noResultsDescription: Adjust filters to see more formats.

createDialog.title: Create Document Format
createDialog.description: Create a new document format for this company to manage processing configurations for specific document types.
createDialog.fieldMappingDescription: Automatically create a format-specific field mapping configuration
createDialog.promptConfigDescription: Automatically create a format-specific AI prompt configuration

detail.loadErrorDescription: An error occurred while loading format details. Please try again later.
detail.notFoundDescription: This format may have been deleted or you don't have permission to access it.

terms.title: Common Terms
terms.emptyDescription: After processing more files, the system will automatically identify and record common terms.

logoPatterns.title: Logo Patterns
logoPatterns.description: Define the position and features of logos in the document for format identification

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: When the document contains these keywords, it is more likely to be identified as this format
keywords.placeholder: Type a keyword and press Enter (e.g., Ocean Freight, B/L No)

layoutHints.title: Layout Features
layoutHints.description: Describe the layout features of this format for AI identification reference
layoutHints.placeholder: Describe the layout features, e.g., Table-style document with company logo on the left, document number in the upper right, and detail table below...

priority.title: Identification Priority
priority.description: When multiple formats match, formats with higher priority will be selected first
priority.label: Priority: {value}

configs.loadErrorDescription: Unable to retrieve configuration information, please try again later.

prompt.title: Prompt Configuration
prompt.description: Define the prompts used for AI extraction and classification. Format-specific configurations take priority over company and global configurations.

mapping.title: Field Mapping Configuration
mapping.description: Define field transformation rules to map extracted fields to standard format.

inheritance.title: Configuration Inheritance
inheritance.description: Configurations follow a hierarchical structure: Format > Company > Global. Higher priority levels override lower ones.
